import axios from"axios";const API_BASE_URL="http://localhost:5400";// Fetch all restaurants
export const fetchRestaurants=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/restaurants"));return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching restaurants:",error);return[];}};// Fetch restaurant details
export const fetchRestaurantDetails=async id=>{try{const response=await axios.get("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/restaurants/").concat(id));return response.data.restaurant;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching restaurant:",error);return null;}};// Fetch restaurants by city
export const fetchRestaurantsByCity=async city=>{try{const response=await axios.get("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/getRestaurantsByCity/").concat(city));return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching restaurants in city:",error);return[];}};// User Signup
export const signupUser=async userData=>{try{const response=await axios.post("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/signup"),userData);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Signup failed:",error);return{error:"Signup failed"};}};// User Login
export const loginUser=async credentials=>{try{const response=await axios.post("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/login"),credentials);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Login failed:",error);return{error:"Login failed"};}};
